objective: Produce a self-contained Colab-runnable training script for EfficientNet-B0+GeM on BirdCLEF 2026 (EXP-02). The script must satisfy Constitution §6 reproducibility requirements.
success_criteria: Script runs in a single Colab cell with A100 GPU and mounted Google Drive.
Uses EfficientNet-B0 + GeM pooling, BCE focal loss, MixUp alpha=0.15, AdamW lr=3e-4, cosine schedule.
Implements group-aware train/val split (by primary_label or recording source) with seed 3407, fold 0.
Logs per-epoch: loss, macro_auroc, LR, GPU memory, wall-clock time.
Saves best checkpoint to Drive with model state, optimizer state, epoch, and metric.
Generates submission CSV from best checkpoint on test soundscapes.
Prints final JSON artifact suitable for experiment_log/training_run_birdclef2026-effnet-b0-001.json.
evidence_requirements: Script must include: random seed, git hash placeholder, exact hyperparameters from method manifest.
Script must handle OOM gracefully: catch RuntimeError, halve batch size, retry.
All Drive paths must be configurable at the top of the script, not hardcoded inline.
Do NOT import from benchmark_harness — script must be self-contained for Colab paste.
stop_conditions: If the method manifest is ambiguous about any hyperparameter, use the default from the manifest and log the choice.
If torchaudio is unavailable, fall back to librosa and log the change.
Do not attempt to run the script — only produce the code file.
